title: Eunoia AI OS — Platform Overview
description: A comprehensive overview of the Eunoia AI OS platform: what it is, how it works, and what it enables for hospitality businesses.
body:
# Eunoia AI OS — Platform Overview

## What is Eunoia AI OS?

Eunoia AI OS is a multi-tenant B2B AI operating system purpose-built for the hospitality industry in the MENA region. It gives hotel managers, restaurant operators, and hospitality teams a private, intelligent AI assistant that answers questions exclusively from their own uploaded knowledge — never from the general internet.

The core value proposition: staff and guests can ask questions in plain language and receive cited, accurate answers drawn from the property's own policies, procedures, menus, FAQs, and training materials.

## Core Capabilities

### AI-Powered Knowledge Assistant
The AI assistant is trained on your organization's documents. It answers questions about your specific policies, services, procedures, and FAQs. Every answer cites the source document, so staff know exactly where the information comes from.

### Knowledge Base Management
Organization administrators upload and manage knowledge documents through the Knowledge Base module. Documents can be text articles, FAQs, standard operating procedures (SOPs), service guides, and training materials. Supported format: plain text and rich text content.

### Multi-Tenant Architecture
Each organization has completely isolated data. Eunoia AI OS uses Row-Level Security (RLS) on all database tables to guarantee that one organization's data is never visible to another. There is no cross-tenant data leakage by design.

### Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
Three roles control access within each organization:
- **Owner**: Full control including billing and organization deletion
- **Admin**: Full operational control including team management and knowledge base management
- **Member**: Can use the AI assistant and view documents but cannot modify them

### Usage Tracking and Audit Logs
All AI queries and administrative actions are logged. Administrators can review usage patterns, query history, and team activity through the Audit Logs module.

## Three Knowledge Layers

Eunoia AI OS organizes knowledge into three distinct layers:

1. **Global Knowledge** — Platform-level knowledge that applies to all organizations. Includes platform documentation, universal hospitality principles, and AI best practices. You are reading a Global Knowledge document right now.

2. **Industry Knowledge** — Curated knowledge packs for specific industries (hotels, restaurants, medical clinics, real estate, travel agencies). Contains industry-standard procedures, compliance frameworks, and best practices tailored to the sector.

3. **Customer Knowledge** — Organization-specific knowledge uploaded by your team. This is what makes your AI assistant unique — it knows your menu, your policies, your staff procedures, your specific room types and services.

When the AI assistant answers a question, it searches all three layers and returns the most relevant information.

## How the AI Assistant Works

1. A user types a question in the Assistant interface.
2. Eunoia converts the question into a mathematical representation (embedding vector).
3. The system searches your Knowledge Base (plus Global and Industry Knowledge) for the most similar content.
4. The most relevant passages are passed to the AI model along with the original question.
5. The AI generates an answer citing the specific source documents.
6. The answer and citations are returned to the user.

This approach — known as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) — ensures the AI only says what is in your knowledge base, not what it imagines or guesses.

## What Eunoia AI OS Is NOT

- It is not a general-purpose chatbot. It only knows what you have uploaded.
- It is not connected to the internet during inference. Answers come from your knowledge base.
- It is not a replacement for your team. It augments staff productivity by providing instant access to institutional knowledge.
- It does not share your data with other customers. Your knowledge is completely private.

## Supported Industries

- Hotels and resorts
- Restaurants and food & beverage
- Medical clinics and wellness centers
- Real estate agencies
- Travel and tour agencies

## Getting Started

1. Log in to your organization dashboard.
2. Navigate to Knowledge Base → Add Document.
3. Upload your key policies, FAQs, and service guides.
4. Open the AI Assistant and ask your first question.

The more content you upload, the more accurately the assistant can answer. Start with your top 10 most frequently asked questions and build from there.
